title: Mileage & Caregiving Expense Tracker
summary: Log caregiving-related trips and out-of-pocket costs as they happen, then export or print the full record whenever you need it.
mileageRateHint: Check the current IRS medical/moving mileage rate for the applicable tax year — rates change annually, so this is just a starting default you can edit.
disclaimer: This tracker is for your own recordkeeping. It doesn't determine what's tax-deductible or reimbursable — check with a tax professional or the relevant benefit program about what actually qualifies.
